package.name: mission_agent
package.description: Per-robot mission agent for the D-MUTRA swarm experiments. A self-contained rclcpp executable (all control logic in its own .text) that receives a waypoint queue from the orchestrator, drives Nav2 via navigate_to_pose, and publishes mission status. Its 10 Hz tick loop is the deterministic runtime tampering target: corrupting it freezes the robot's mission participation while remaining inside the attested .text section.
